name: Easy Garlic Cheese Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C).
2. In a large bowl, stir together the Bisquick baking mix, milk, and shredded Cheddar cheese until a soft dough forms.
3. Using an electric mixer, beat the mixture vigorously for about 30 strokes.
4. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet, spacing them about 10 to 12 inches apart.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 8 to 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Brush the warm biscuits with melted butter mixed with garlic powder before removing from the cookie sheet.
7. Serve warm. Makes approximately 10 to 12 biscuits.
High Altitude Directions (3500 to 6500 feet):
Preheat oven to 475 degrees F (245 degrees C). Bake for 9 to 11 minutes.
